name: ngx-theme-stack
description: A stack of themes for Angular applications.

scripts.postbuild:
copyfiles schematics/*/schema.json schematics/*/files/** schematics/collection.json ../../dist/ngx-theme-stack/ && printf "# Nested package.json's are only needed for development.
**/package.json
# Exception: schematics/package.json is required for CommonJS module resolution
!schematics/package.json
" > ../../dist/ngx-theme-stack/.npmignore
